ops.body: Adversarial-coverage enumeration (verified by reading test bodies): 10/12 Verification-#3 branches COVERED — Undetermined/no-force (drain/liveness_test.go:35, drain/scan_test.go:94), enumeration-error-not-zero-candidates (scan_test.go:138), same-or-newer-zero-shutdowns (daemon/takeover_test.go:15), self/PID<=1 guards (takeover_test.go:203, proc/reaper_test.go:229), ESRCH-as-success, PID-reuse revalidation (takeover killIfSameOwner + proc/reaper_test.go:140), persisted strikes across restart (drain/run_test.go:353, fresh StrikeStore on same path), lost fence (run_test.go:143), busy/wedged Restore-before-next-attempt (run_test.go:91,164), successor-not-Ready (run_test.go:256), unreadable-peer-unadopted + cold-start adopt (scan_test.go:77,55). TWO GAPS keep criterion c12cb13 open: (1) daemon/takeover.go PIDExit WaitMode (lines 44,215-224,256-264) has zero test coverage; (2) no test pins wire.Server.Serve's OpenStore→BootReconcile→accept ordering (wire/server.go:102-104,194-199 implements it; no *_test.go references BootReconcile). Both are bounded test additions, queued.
